tool_input.summary:
FAC direction in Juno’s low-altitude main-aurora crossings: the **equatorward** main-auroral sheet/zone carries **upward** field-aligned current (from Jupiter’s ionosphere out to the magnetosphere; typically accompanied by **downward precipitating electrons** that power the bright main emission), while the **poleward** adjacent main-auroral sheet/zone carries the **downward (return)** field-aligned current (toward Jupiter; often associated with **upward-going electrons** and weaker precipitation).

PDS datasets below are the key Juno archives you’d use to reproduce/verify this with in situ currents (MAG/FGM) plus particle signatures (JADE/JEDI) and auroral context (UVS/JIRAM), along with SPICE for mapping.

candidates.title: JNO J 3 FGM CAL V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Juno fluxgate magnetometer (FGM) calibrated magnetic field—used to compute magnetic perturbations and infer field-aligned current sheets during low-altitude auroral crossings.

candidates.title: JNO J JAD 5 MOMENTS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: JADE plasma moments—helps distinguish upward vs downward electron populations associated with upward/downward FAC in auroral zones.

candidates.title: JNO J JED 3 CDR V1.0
candidates.reasoning: JEDI calibrated energetic particle data—context for auroral electron/ion precipitation and acceleration associated with the main-oval current system.

candidates.title: JNO J JED 2 EDR V1.0
candidates.reasoning: JEDI raw/EDR data—lowest-level energetic particle measurements if you need to re-derive higher-level products used in FAC/aurora studies.

candidates.title: ATM Volume jnouvs_3001 (JUNO UVS OBSERVATIONS)

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
